title: lespedeza hedysaroides var. subsericea
intro: Lespedeza hedysaroides var. subsericea, also known as a type of lespedeza plant, is a perennial legume native to East Asia and parts of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and urinary tract issues. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Lespedeza hedysaroides var. subsericea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
